# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment YAML for our Python web application. The app runs a Flask API on port 5000. We need 3 replicas for high availability. Keep the configuration simple for quick deployment to our production cluster.

Prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: python-webapp
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: flaskapi
        image: your-python-webapp/image # replace with the actual Docker Image of Python Web App. For example, pythonflaskimg or myregistry/myrepo:latest 
        ports:
          - containerPort: 5000  
      securityContext: {}
